justification: All 7 ACs covered with correct test logic. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (not as error) with both not.toThrow() and value assertions. AC7 whitespace tested with '   ' (whitespace-only string). Fee arithmetic verified numerically in AC2: refundAmount === 98.5 === 100 - 1.50. Boundary values exact: 0 (AC4), 10000 (AC6), 10001 (AC5). No implementation changes — only processRefund.test.ts created. acceptance_criteria_coverage complete for all 7 ACs. deviations section is empty.

observations.text: All 7 ACs have dedicated tests with explicit AC-prefixed test names
AC6 boundary test correctly treats amount=10000 as valid with two-phase assertion (not.toThrow + value checks)
AC7 uses whitespace-only string '   ' as required, not just empty string
AC2 verifies fee arithmetic numerically: fee===1.5 AND refundAmount===98.5
Error message strings are pinned for precise assertion matching
acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs to test names with notes
deviations array is empty — no scope creep
Only test file created, no implementation changes
